entities.name: sqlite3
entities.context: Database tool used for querying the productivity tracker database

entities.name: productivity_tracker.db
entities.context: SQLite database storing daily productivity statistics including emails, meetings, and RPI

entities.name: Gmail API
entities.context: Email service API used to fetch emails_sent count for productivity tracking

entities.name: Calendar API
entities.context: Calendar service API used to fetch meeting_hours for productivity tracking

entities.name: RPI
entities.context: Productivity metric calculated from emails sent and meeting hours with expected values

entities.name: daily_stats
entities.context: Database table tracking daily productivity metrics including date, emails, meetings, and RPI

relationships.context: Database is queried using sqlite3 command-line tool
RPI calculation depends on emails_sent data from Gmail
RPI calculation depends on meeting_hours data from Calendar
daily_stats table stores calculated RPI values
daily_stats is a table within the productivity tracker database
